Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}From what I understand, Mitsuru has already given you the short version.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Well, it's true. We adults are to blame.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}If I could've atoned for it with my life, I would have done so.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Now, I have no choice but to rely on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}What my father wanted to create with those monsters' power...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}That's what he was trying to do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Imagine if you could control the flow of time, eliminate unwanted events before they occur.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}With such a device, you could shape the future to your liking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Unfortunately, under my father's direction, the research began to stray from its original goal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}In his later years, my father seemed to have only nihilism in his heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}In fact, his madness may have resulted from his struggle to break free from that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It's only natural that you want to know the truth. And it's my duty to tell you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}This is the only existing footage of the accident, recorded by a scientist who was at the scene.[n]{f 1 1}
